prompt:
Create a cinematic editorial lifestyle photo series featuring a young curly-haired male in a peaceful forest environment. Preserve the exact facial structure, hairstyle, body proportions, clothing style, and natural appearance from the reference image.
The subject wears an oversized faded gray t-shirt with a small graphic detail on the chest, loose dark charcoal jeans, white sneakers, and a minimalist wristwatch. The overall styling should feel casual, authentic, and modern, with a subtle Scandinavian outdoor aesthetic.
Composition & Layout Generate a 9-frame collage moodboard consisting of different candid poses and perspectives:
Sitting by a shallow riverbank surrounded by grass and rocks, gazing upward thoughtfully.
Standing on a large rock with arms open wide, looking toward the sky.
Soft-focus artistic shot partially obscured by trees, creating a dreamy cinematic effect.
Leaning against a tree trunk in a relaxed contemplative pose.
Sitting on forest grass near wooden structures, smiling naturally.
Standing beside a woodland path with hands behind the back.
Close-up detail shot of wristwatch, jeans, and sneakers.
Squatting on a wet road surrounded by dense forest.
Walking slowly through a dark forest path, captured candidly.
Environment Dense green forest, tall pine trees, natural woodland scenery, small waterfall, winding dirt roads, wet ground after light rain, rich organic textures, moss, grass, and wooden elements.
Lighting Soft overcast daylight, diffused natural light, moody forest shadows, subtle highlights on hair, gentle contrast, no harsh sunlight, atmospheric depth.
Color Grading Dark earthy tones, muted greens, desaturated blues, warm gray shadows, cinematic film look, natural skin tones, slightly matte finish, subtle Kodak Portra color science, premium outdoor editorial aesthetic.
Photography Style High-end fashion editorial, cinematic storytelling, candid documentary photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, soft bokeh, realistic textures, natural expressions, emotional and introspective mood.
Mood Quiet, reflective, nostalgic, peaceful, grounded, connected with nature, youthful freedom, authentic outdoor lifestyle.
Quality Ultra realistic, professional photography, magazine editorial quality, 8K resolution, exceptional detail, realistic skin texture, natural fabric folds, cinematic depth, award-winning outdoor portrait photography.
